commits.message: fix: expose missing API tokens in runtime config
fix: expose MONKEYTYPE_TOKEN in runtime config
feat: Add discord-forums data attribute parsing and prompt composition
fix: add timeout wrapper for fetch to prevent ECONNRESET crashes
feat: improve chess stats with per-type win rates and clearer game ages
fix: correct chess win rate display from 5933% to proper percentage
refactor: remove redundant STATUS headers from stats components
fix: remove left padding from stats page header
fix: remove center alignment from RescueTime stats intro
refactor: increase typography scale contrast with 10px minimum
feat: add increased tracking to ultra-small text sizes
refactor: replace hardcoded text sizes with Tailwind utilities
feat: make Amazon affiliate buy links actually discoverable
feat: add smart units, favorites, and recently used gear
feat: add data-dense gear stats with weight per category
fix: update gear-stats API to use Weight_oz column
refactor: simplify GearStats with delete-driven development
Extract LLM loop and error recovery from orchestrator (91.6% reduction complete)
feat: enhance stats displays with RSS parsing and visual improvements
Refactor: Extract capability-orchestrator into modular services (78% reduction)
docs: add hand-written release summary to CHANGELOG
chore: bump version to 0.3.0
fix: enable native macOS window controls and fix node creation in Tauri
perf: enable Nitro buildCache for 15-25s deployment speedup
test: trigger TURBO deployment for timing analysis
fix: complete Tauri desktop app security hardening and webview loading
fix: TURBO deployment script with absolute Node path for cron
Fix Discord context awareness - LLM now knows it's in Discord
chore: Add missing dependencies slugify and @types/geojson
fix(theme): visual mode selection now readable with cyberpunk blue
fix: Add sharp dependency for MetroSaveFormat
Add synchronous mode to Chat API with ?wait=true
fix: align stats sidebar with main navigation
fix: complete Tauri auth bypass for desktop app
refactor: predictions page refinements with Tuftian design
feat: add multi-provider OAuth support (Google, Microsoft, Discord, GitLab)
chore: Comment out debug console.log statements
Add nested heredoc detection with clear error message
docs: update CLAUDE.md with llms.txt and api-docs implementation
feat: add interactive API documentation page
feat: ruthlessly optimize llms.txt for LLM consumption
Add comprehensive line-specific editing examples
Add markdown code block support to shell capability
predict: update sources to AP, THE CITY, NPR
predict: add proper sources to Mamdani resolution
fix: Add missing React Hook dependencies
fix: Add playwright-report to eslintignore
predict: ✅ resolve "Zohran Mamdani will win the 2025 NYC mayoral..." as correct
chore: Remove more non-autosave changes
Clean up shell examples - remove escaping hell
Add comprehensive file editing examples (sed + scripting)
Teach Artie Unix file operations (cat, heredoc, sed, grep)
chore: Remove non-autosave changes (version bumps, landing page)
Add comprehensive examples to shell capability
Simplify sandbox to run as root
feat(save): Add validation and consolidate migrations
feat: add dynamic OpenGraph tags with real-time data
Merge origin/beta into feature/clean-autosave
Final A+ polish: complete red/pink palette, add missing groups
Add MatchParen and polish NonText groups in nvim exporter
Hand-fix nvim theme readability: ultra-subtle UI chrome
Update submodule pointers to latest commits
Migrate from Supabase to local API endpoints
Improve nvim theme readability with ultra-subtle UI chrome
fix(save): Add save lock to handleOverwrite to prevent race condition
fix(tweets): Prevent immediate generation when loading old saves
Apply Prettier formatting across TypeScript codebase
fix(newspaper): Prevent immediate generation when loading old saves
Update documentation and architecture analysis
Fix nvim exporter: subtle line numbers and clean explorer bg
Add bat and btop vulpes-reddish2 themes
Fix nvim dark theme: subtler line numbers and red/pink colors
Update vulpes-reddish2 theme: fix colors to use red/pink palette
